result.stdout:
docx2oc 1.0.0 - Export Word documents to OpenContracts format

Usage:
  docx2oc <input.docx> [output.json]

Arguments:
  input.docx     Path to the input Word document
  output.json    Path for the output JSON file (optional)
                 Default: same name as input with .oc extension

Options:
  -h, --help     Show this help message
  -v, --version  Show version information

Examples:
  docx2oc contract.docx                  # Creates contract.oc
  docx2oc contract.docx export.json      # Creates export.json
  docx2oc document.docx analysis.oc      # Creates analysis.oc

Output Format:
  The output is a JSON file containing:
  - title: Document title
  - content: Full extracted text
  - pageCount: Estimated page count
  - pawlsFileContent: Token positions for each page
  - labelledText: Structural annotations (sections, paragraphs, tables)
  - relationships: Annotation relationships

Environment Variables:
  DOCX2OC_DEBUG=1  Show detailed error information
